name: Toll House Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cream together the butter and both sugars until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs and vanilla.
4. Stir together the flour, salt, and baking soda in a separate bowl.
5. Stir the flour mixture into the butter mixture.
6. Stir in the chocolate chips.
7. Drop the batter by spoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 6 to 8 minutes.
9. Cool on wire racks.
